hero.label: Stay connected
hero.title: Join the community chat
hero.lead: Share what you're building, get help with your local AI setup, and stay across the latest open models.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.lead: We use Superbridge to connect five different messaging apps into one group. Pick whichever platform you're already on, and your messages will reach everyone on all the others.

newsletter.label: Stay in the loop
newsletter.title: Get the newsletter
newsletter.lead: Occasional updates on upcoming events, new guides, and what's happening in the local AI space. No spam. Unsubscribe any time.
